title: GoalProgressPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `goal_progress` event — narrative progress note emitted mid-run. See spec/goal-lifecycle-v1.md §5.3.

note.description: Free-text progress narration from the `report_progress` tool. Consumers MUST NOT parse it semantically.
Free-text progress narration from the `report_progress` tool. Consumers MUST NOT parse it semantically.
